pages: Welcome to the tutorial room! Here you'll learn the basic actions. It will only take a moment. First, use WASD or the arrow keys to move.
Great! Now use SHIFT to accelerate, SPACE to go up, and CTRL to go down.

Excellent! Now approach that human. As you can see, there's an icon above their head indicating their intentions. Right now, they want to buy a plastic bottle from a vending machine. Get close and press F or Left Mouse Button to sting them!

Well done! Now, they'll want to use the reusable (red) thermos. You've helped reduce plastic consumption. Now, try picking up that discarded plastic bottle on the ground. You can drop it on the humans' heads to deter them, just like when you sting them!
